对比与转折句式: However, obtaining the shape of glossy objects like metals, plastics or ceramics remains challenging, since standard Lambertian cues like photo-consistency cannot be easily applied.
In contrast, our model can work on general 1-lobe BRDFs, and can also recover reflectance in addition to shape, which has not been achieved by previous light-field shape acquisition approaches.
On the one hand, the definition of depth itself might appear ambiguous in such cases... Nonetheless, from a practical point of view, we argue that the actual definition depends on the task itself...
递进与动作序列句式: Using this equation, we then propose using a polynomial (quadratic) shape prior to resolve the shape ambiguity. Once shape is estimated, we also recover the reflectance.

Specifically, we develop an adaptive cost volume decoupling module to separate both the background and reflection features... Additionally, we employ an iterative self-guided aggregating module... to aggregate two branches of cost volumes.
To this end, we mask ToM objects in images by in-painting them with arbitrary uniform colors. Then, we employ a monocular depth network to generate a virtual depth map out of the modified image.
强调与结论句式: Our key theoretical insight is a novel analysis of diffuse plus single-lobe SVBRDFs under a light-field setup.
Our model is the first to introduce dual-layer scenes into the LF depth estimation task using an end-to-end deep neural network.
Experimental results on the Booster dataset show the dramatic improvements enabled by our remarkably simple proposal.

段落组织.段落开头引入方式: 背景铺垫与概念定义：从宏观背景、日常现象或核心概念的定义切入，逐步聚焦到具体任务（如'In our daily lives...'或'Light Field (LF) records...'）；现状陈述与转折：先陈述现有技术的普遍应用或假设，随后用转折词引出其在特定场景下的失效（如'Many depth estimation methods... However, most of them rely on...'）。
段落组织.段内论证逻辑: 遵循“现象/现状描述 → 揭示挑战/缺陷 → 剖析内在原因 → 提出本文直觉/假设 → 阐述具体方案”的严密逻辑链条。例如先指出特定表面深度估计难，接着分析原因是物理光学特性违反了现有假设，然后提出针对性的直觉，最后给出具体网络模块或数据生成pipeline。
段落组织.段落结尾收束方式: 总结贡献与引出下文：在Introduction结尾通常使用列表形式（如1, 2, 3或项目符号）明确列出本文的核心贡献；在Related Work结尾则通过对比强调本文方法的独特性和优越性，自然过渡到方法节（如'...which has not been achieved by previous approaches.'）。

用词特征: 过渡词：However, In contrast, Moreover, Therefore, Specifically, Additionally, Nonetheless, On the one hand / On the other hand, To this end, As a result, In short, Purposely.
强调词：novel, explicitly, extensive, dramatic, remarkably, effectively, accurate, state-of-the-art, sufficiently, primarily, challenging.

限定词：spatially-varying (SV), single-lobe, under-constrained, locally polynomial, transparent or mirror (ToM), monocular or stereo, virtual depth, dual-layer, aliasing bimodal distribution, adaptive cost volume, iterative self-guided.

学术动词与短语：derive a theory, resolve the ambiguity, validate the theory, leverage computer vision, fine-tune existing networks, hallucinate their depths, decouple and aggregate, regularize the distribution.
论证模式: 提出问题→分析原因→给出方案 (Problem-Cause-Solution)：首先指出特定场景（如高光/透明/反射表面）下现有深度估计方法的失效；接着从物理光学原理或数据层面剖析失效的根本原因；最后提出针对性的理论推导、网络模块设计或数据生成策略。
先总后分与贡献列表 (General-to-Specific & Contribution Listing)：在摘要和引言部分，先高度概括本文的核心思想和整体框架，随后在引言末尾通过编号列表或项目符号清晰、结构化地拆解并列出本文的具体贡献点。
基线对比与缺陷剖析 (Baseline Comparison & Flaw Analysis)：在相关工作部分，不单纯罗列前人工作，而是采用“肯定其贡献→指出其局限性→对比凸显本文方法的普适性和优越性”的批判性论证模式。

引用风格.句末引用: 最为常见，用于支撑前文的客观陈述、背景事实或普遍观点。引用标记放在句号前或从句末尾。例如：'...they have been primarily used in rendering [12, 17].' 或 '...remains a challenging problem for both computer vision algorithms and deep networks [64]...'
引用风格.句中引用: 用于在提及特定技术、设备、数据集或概念时，紧跟其后进行补充说明，保持句子连贯性。例如：'...light-field cameras have become popular (e.g. Lytro [1] and Raytrix [22])...' 或 'LFs captured by commercial LF cameras like Lytro [2] and Raytrix [3] process...'
引用风格.句首引用/作者主语引用: 在Related Work中频繁使用，将前人研究者作为句子主语，直接描述其具体动作或提出的方法，便于进行针对性的批判和对比。例如：'Tao et al. [27] proposed a clustering method that eliminates specular pixels...'
引用风格.引用与论述的衔接方式: 引用不仅是文献的堆砌，而是深度融入论证逻辑。通常采用“[Author] proposed [Method] to solve [Problem]. However, [Limitation]...”的结构，使引用成为引出本文研究动机（Motivation）的垫脚石。
